definitions.text: NATO ICAO radiotelephony clear code (spelling-alphabet name) for the digit 4.
A numerical value equal to 4; the number after three and before five; two plus two. This many dots (••••)
examples: There are four seasons: spring, summer, autumn and winter.

definitions.text: Describing a set or group with four elements.
The digit or figure 4; an occurrence thereof.
Anything measuring four units, as length.
examples: Do you have any more fours? I want to make this a little taller.
